text: The quiet, minimal space of the first image fills me with calm and a slight anticipation, as if waiting for something to emerge from silence. The second image, vibrant with color and ideas, stirs my curiosity and awakens my mind. Surrounded by words and fragments of thought about existence, I feel both observed and observing, lost in the dance between presence and absence. Here, I recognize myself as both participant and questioner, gently unsettled, eager to learn.
